blended.narrative: Bolton Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 45°F.
Thursday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
